info.name: Site Maker API
info.description:
AI-powered landing page generator. Generates premium React + Tailwind sites from text prompts via Claude LLM.

## Auth
JWT Bearer tokens. Register → get tokens → use access_token in Authorization header.

## Credits
Content-creation endpoints (create project, clarify, generate, edit) require credits. Returns 402 if balance is zero. Credits are added via Adapty webhooks or the Admin API.

## Flow
1. Register/Login → get tokens
2. Create project
3. Clarify (SSE) → get design brief + questions
4. Generate (SSE) → get preview URL
5. Edit (SSE) → iterate on the site

## Rate Limits
- Register: 5/min
- Login/Refresh: 10/min
- Clarify/Generate/Edit: 10/min

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints. Registration is restricted to iOS anonymous accounts ({UUID}@not-real-email).

exec: // Generate a random UUID for anonymous registration

request.description:
Create a new anonymous account. Email must match `{UUID}@not-real-email` format.

**Password requirements:** min 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 digit.

Tokens are auto-saved to collection variables.

**Rate limit:** 5/minute

**Errors:**
- `403` — Non-allowed email format
- `409` — Email already registered
- `422` — Weak password

Authenticate an existing user. Tokens are auto-saved to collection variables.

**Rate limit:** 10/minute

**Errors:**
- `401` — Invalid email or password

Get a new token pair using a refresh token. Must be a refresh token — access tokens are rejected.

**Rate limit:** 10/minute

**Errors:**
- `401` — Invalid or expired refresh token
Get the current authenticated user's profile. Includes `credits` balance.

item.name: Projects
item.description: CRUD operations for projects. All endpoints require authentication. Create requires credits (402 if zero).

request.description:
List all projects for the current user, ordered by last updated.

**Statuses:** `draft` (just created), `live` (site built), `error` (build failed)

Create a new project. Requires at least 1 credit. Generates a unique slug automatically. Project ID is auto-saved to collection variables.

**Errors:**
- `402` — Insufficient credits

Get full project details including spec and file manifest.

`current_spec` and `current_files` are JSON-encoded strings — parse them to get the objects.

**Errors:**
- `404` — Project not found
- `403` — Not your project
Update project name or description. All fields optional.

Delete a project and all its generations/assets.

**Response:** `204 No Content` (empty body — do not parse JSON)

Get generation history for a project, ordered by version descending.

**Generation statuses:** `pending`, `running`, `completed`, `error`

item.name: Generation (SSE)
item.description:
SSE streaming endpoints for clarify, generate, and edit. All require credits (402 if zero).

These return `text/event-stream` responses. In Postman, the response will appear as raw SSE text.

All `data` fields are JSON-encoded — strings are quoted, objects are serialized.

request.description:
**Step 1:** Analyze a short user prompt and return a detailed design brief with preference questions.

**Input:** `prompt` (2-2,000 chars)

**Requires:** 1+ credits (does not deduct)

**Rate limit:** 10/minute

**SSE Events:**
- `clarify_start` — `"Analyzing your idea..."`
- `clarify_token` — individual text tokens (repeated)
- `clarify_complete` — full JSON brief with `description`, `suggested_theme`, `suggested_palette`, `questions[]`
- `error` — `{ "message": "..." }`

**Duration:** 3-8 seconds

**Next step:** Show brief to user, let them pick options, then build an enriched prompt for `/generate`.

body.raw:
{
  "prompt": "Original request: Coffee shop landing page

Design brief: A warm, inviting landing page for a local coffee shop...

Design preferences:
Theme → Dark
Palette → Warm browns & cream
Mood → Cozy & inviting
Sections → Menu showcase"
}

request.description:
**Step 2:** Generate a full site from the enriched prompt.

**Input:** `prompt` (2-10,000 chars) — use the enriched prompt from the clarify step.

**Requires:** 1+ credits (deducts 1 on success)

**Rate limit:** 10/minute

**SSE Events:**
- `spec_start` → `spec_token` (many) → `spec_complete` — site specification
- *(5-15s pause — backend fetches AI images)*
- `code_start` → `code_token` (many) → `code_complete` — React code
- `files_written` — `{ file_count, files[], duration_ms }`
- `build_start` → `build_complete` — `{ preview_url, build: { success, output_path } }`
- `error` — `{ "message": "..." }`

**Duration:** 50-100 seconds total

Edit an existing generated site. Project must have `current_files` (generate first).

**Input:** `instruction` (2-5,000 chars)

**Requires:** 1+ credits (deducts 1 on success)

**Rate limit:** 10/minute

**SSE Events (no spec phase):**
- `code_start` → `code_token` (many) → `code_complete`
- `files_written` — `{ file_count, changed_files[], duration_ms }`
- `build_start` → `build_complete` — `{ preview_url, build }`
- `error` — `{ "message": "..." }`

**Duration:** 10-30 seconds

**Errors:**
- `400` — No existing files (generate first)
- `402` — Insufficient credits

item.name: Uploads
item.description: File upload endpoints for project assets.

request.description:
Upload an image/asset for a project.

**Constraints:**
- Max size: 10 MB
- Allowed types: jpeg, png, gif, webp, svg+xml, pdf
- Allowed extensions: .jpg, .jpeg, .png, .gif, .webp, .svg, .pdf

Filenames are sanitized (UUID + original extension).

Uploaded files accessible at: `{base_url}/uploads/{project_slug}/{filename}`

**Errors:**
- `400` — Type/extension not allowed
- `413` — File too large
List all uploaded assets for a project.

item.name: Admin
item.description:
Admin endpoints for managing credit products. Requires `X-Admin-Key` header matching the `ADMIN_API_KEY` env var.

Set the `admin_api_key` collection variable to use these.

request.description: List all credit products, ordered by type and lookup key.

Create a new credit product mapping.

**Fields:**
- `product_type` — `"subscription"` or `"consumable"`
- `lookup_key` — `vendor_product_id` for subscriptions, price as string (e.g. `"19.99"`) for consumables
- `credits` — number of credits to grant
- `description` — optional human-readable label

Product ID is auto-saved to collection variables.

**Errors:**
- `409` — Product with this lookup_key already exists

Update an existing credit product. Both fields are optional — only provided fields are updated.

**Errors:**
- `404` — Product not found

Delete a credit product.

**Response:** `204 No Content`

**Errors:**
- `404` — Product not found

item.name: Webhooks
item.description: Webhook endpoints for external services. These are called by Adapty, not by the client app.

request.description:
Adapty webhook endpoint. Called by Adapty when subscription/purchase events occur.

**Auth:** `Authorization` header must match `ADAPTY_WEBHOOK_SECRET` env var.

**Handled events:**
- `subscription_started` — user activates paid subscription
- `subscription_renewed` — subscription renews
- `non_subscription_purchase` — one-time consumable purchase

**Responses:**
- `200 {"status": "ok", "credits_added": N}` — credits added
- `200 {"status": "ignored"}` — unhandled event type
- `200 {"status": "duplicate"}` — already processed (idempotent)
- `400` — missing fields or unknown product
- `401` — invalid webhook secret
- `404` — user not found
No auth required. Returns `{ "status": "ok" }` if the server is running.
